title: PersonalOS Insight Schema
description: Schema for validating insights extracted from conversations to be integrated into PersonalOS ledgers.

type.description: The category of the extracted insight.

title.description: A short, descriptive title of the insight.

content.description: The detailed content, evidence, or reasoning for the insight.

confidence.description: Confidence level of the extraction or validation (0.0 to 1.0).

source.description: The source of the insight (e.g., conversation ID, message reference, or user quote).

date.description: The date the insight was captured or updated (YYYY-MM-DD).
